3248420.name: My Love for You is Evermore
3248420.description:
You’ve spent two years at Evermore Consulting’s elite PR division, waiting for your big break. Now, your dream assignment arrives: handling Japan’s hottest pop star, Hiro Tachi, who just happens to be your very first love. Will you tackle this project solo and risk having old feelings resurface? Or perhaps join forces with your ambitious rival, Minoru, to lighten the load?

There’s also the prestigious hotel renovation with Daichi that could use your expertise, and the charismatic department executive, Kyosuke, looking for a partner as well. And now... The mysterious "Manager" joins the lineup, Hiro's manager is forever hidden behind a kitsune mask; what could he be hiding?

Every decision shapes your destiny, affecting not only your professional success but your potential happily ever after. Will it be a whirlwind, dramatic romance… or a gentle, serene love story? The path is yours to choose!

Key Features

  • Office Rom-Com: Join a lively workplace family, full of comedic hijinks, dramatic rivalries, and unexpected sparks of love.

  • Your Name, Your Story: Enter your name to be the star of this immersive tale—texts, calls, and all dialogue center on you.

  • Interactive Multimedia: Enjoy video calls and voice messages from the love interests themselves.

  • Star-Studded Voice Features: Featuring Kaiji Tang (Gojo in JJK), David Matranga (Todoroki in MHA), and Joe Zieja (Claude in FE3H).

  • Multiple Endings: Enjoy three unique endings per route - Two successful endings, dramatic and serene, with exclusive CGs to collect, and one break-up ending!

What path will you choose in My Love for You is Evermore? Jump in, and fall in love your way.
3248420.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
